title: Potato FPS
description: Smart FPS optimisations for low-end PCs.
body:
# This is one of the most compatible mods out there, you can use it with all your favourite optimization mods.


## This mod is completely client-side!
It will alter your render distance, simulation distance and particles when your FPS goes up or down.

## Please report any bugs or issues in the discord server [here](https://discord.gg/mfXuwNqQab)

## Dependencies
- Fabric API (Required)
### For Config Screen
- Cloth Config API (Optional)
- Mod Menu(Optional)

## We have Discord! 
https://discord.gg/mfZczRhVqf
### DM me
not_justachillguy


![Project Banner with the words "Potato FPS"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe6f961e08130178404625ff06a1279d8972dbee.png)
